positive: A retro-futuristic cityscape viewed through a prism, featuring neon signs, palm trees, and geometric grid lines. Vaporwave aesthetic, synthwave color palette (magenta, cyan, deep purple), highly stylized vector art, 1980s cyberpunk influence, perfect for screen printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grunge, messy, messy lines
